sellers_note: LUXURIOUS, CAPABLE, ONE-OWNER, NONSMOKER, BMW PERFORMANCE MEETS EVERYDAY PRACTICALITY! The 2017 BMW X5 xDrive35i continues to set the benchmark for luxury performance SUVs by combining athletic handling, premium craftsmanship, intelligent ALL-WHEEL DRIVE, and exceptional versatility. Whether you're commuting through the city, taking the family on vacation, or simply enjoying a spirited drive, the X5 delivers the refined driving experience that has made BMW's Sports Activity Vehicles legendary. BMW refers to the X5 as a Sports Activity Vehicle (SAV) because it combines the utility and elevated seating position of an SUV with the precise handling and engaging road manners traditionally associated with BMW sport sedans. The result is an SUV that's every bit as enjoyable to drive as it is practical. WHY SHOPPERS BUY THE X5 The X5 has remained one of the world's most desirable luxury SUVs because it blends premium comfort, exceptional build quality, and athletic driving dynamics better than nearly any competitor. Buyers appreciate its spacious interior, refined turbocharged performance, advanced technology, and confidence-inspiring xDrive ALL-WHEEL DRIVE system. Unlike many luxury SUVs that prioritize comfort alone, the X5 maintains BMW's signature balance of responsive steering, composed handling, and long-distance refinement, making every drive enjoyable regardless of destination. AUTOMOTIVE PRESS AND INDUSTRY RECOGNITION The F15-generation X5 received widespread praise for its luxurious interior, refined powertrain, athletic handling, and overall versatility. Automotive journalists consistently ranked it among the finest luxury midsize SUVs available. IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK+ Car and Driver Editors' Choice Kelley Blue Book Best Luxury SUV recognition Frequently recommended by Edmunds among luxury midsize SUVs WARRANTY The odometer is hovering around the 93,513-mile mark. This X5 has accumulated primarily highway mileage over the years, and BMW's proven engineering continues to provide the refined performance and driving enjoyment that have made the X5 one of the world's premier luxury SUVs. Extended service plans may be available to provide additional peace of mind. STANDARD FEATURES The X5 surrounds occupants with premium craftsmanship, power front seating with memory, dual-zone automatic climate control, panoramic-style interior spaciousness, power liftgate, navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, premium materials, and a beautifully designed cabin that remains timeless years after production. Its spacious rear seating and generous cargo area make the X5 equally capable of handling family road trips, business travel, or everyday errands without sacrificing luxury or driving enjoyment. INSTALLED OPTIONS Driving Assistance Package Head-Up Display. Rearview Camera. Driving Assistance Plus Package Active Blind Spot Detection. Active Driving Assistant. Lane Departure Warning. Forward Collision Warning. Pedestrian Warning. City Collision Mitigation. Speed Limit Information. Surround View Camera System. Premium Package Comfort Access keyless entry. Four-zone automatic climate control. Wireless charging. Wi-Fi hotspot capability. SiriusXM satellite radio capability. Standalone Factory Options Mineral White Metallic exterior paint. Black Dakota leather upholstery. MECHANICAL FEATURES Power comes from BMW's legendary 3.0-liter TwinPower Turbo inline-six producing 300 horsepower and 300 lb-ft of torque, paired with a smooth and responsive eight-speed Sport Automatic transmission. Strong acceleration, silky refinement, and effortless highway cruising continue to make this one of BMW's most celebrated powertrains. BMW's intelligent xDrive ALL-WHEEL DRIVE system continuously monitors road conditions and seamlessly distributes power between the front and rear axles to maximize available traction. Combined with a carefully tuned suspension and precise steering, the X5 delivers exceptional confidence without sacrificing ride comfort. EXTERIOR FEATURE Wholesale Prices: We started off as a wholesaler that provided vehicles to licensed dealerships only. Eventually, we realized that we wanted to provide our high-quality selection of vehicles to the public.
